Sydney Airbnb Pricing

Row

Executive summary

Using 15,717 active Sydney Airbnb listings from the Inside Airbnb scrape of 2023-06-06, an additive log-linear regression of nightly price on size, room type, location and review signals achieves an adjusted R² of 52.6%. Size dominates — each extra bathroom adds about +23% and each bedroom +18% — while superhosts earn a +14% premium. Geography is captured by suburb, not raw distance: Northern Beaches listings sit about 22% above what features alone predict, whereas Western Sydney sits roughly 34% below. The map and tables surface where individual listings are priced below their comparable set (blue, potentially underpriced) versus above (red).
